allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''expo:'', p.dependencies.expo\); console.log\(''react:'', p.dependencies.react\); console.log\(''react-native:'', p.dependencies[''react-native'']\); console.log\(''expo-video:'', p.dependencies[''expo-video'']\);")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('tamagui'\); console.log\('YStack:', typeof t.YStack, 'XStack:', typeof t.XStack, 'Stack:', typeof t.Stack, 'Text:', typeof t.Text\)")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./node_modules/tamagui/dist/cjs/index.cjs'\); console.log\('YStack:', typeof t.YStack, 'XStack:', typeof t.XStack, 'Stack:', typeof t.Stack, 'Text:', typeof t.Text\)")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./node_modules/tamagui/dist/cjs/index.cjs'\); const keys = Object.keys\(t\); console.log\('YStack:', typeof t.YStack, 'XStack:', typeof t.XStack, 'Stack:', typeof t.Stack, 'Text:', typeof t.Text, 'Spinner:', typeof t.Spinner\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import { YStack, XStack, Stack, Text, Spinner } from 'tamagui'; console.log\(typeof YStack, typeof XStack, typeof Stack, typeof Text, typeof Spinner\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import * as t from 'tamagui'; const keys = Object.keys\(t\).filter\(k => k.includes\('Stack'\) || k.includes\('stack'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(powershell -Command "node --input-type=module --eval \\"import * as t from 'tamagui'; const stacks = Object.keys\(t\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('stack'\)\); console.log\(stacks.join\(', '\)\);\\"")
